a11y: Use semantic <table>, <thead>, <tbody>, <th scope="col"> for full screen-reader support.
For complex tables add <caption> or aria-label on the table.
description: A responsive table component; display rows/columns of data. Table/Header/Body/Footer/Head/Row/Cell/Caption.
name: table
title: Table

do: Use semantic composition: Table / TableHeader / TableBody / TableFooter / TableHead / TableRow / TableCell / TableCaption.
Use <TableHead scope="col"> semantics for screen-reader support.
dont: Don't rebuild sortable/data-heavy tables from raw Table parts — use data-table (with data-table-header / data-table-cell).
Don't put form controls in cells ad hoc — use form-table-cell.

whenToUseInstead.when: editable form controls sized for table cells
